contentList.content: Increase your Strength by 2, to a maximum of 30.
Increase your Dexterity by 2, to a maximum of 30.

You regain full <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> when you <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>. Your <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> score is increased by [1], to a maximum of [2].
You have <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourProficiency">Armour Proficiency</LSTag> with Heavy Armour and your <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> increases by [1], to a maximum of [2].
Increase your Charisma by 2, to a maximum of 30.
Increase your Constitution by 2, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 0, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 1, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 2, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 3, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 4, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 5, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 6, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 7, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 8, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 9, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 10, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 11, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 12, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 13, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 14, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 15, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 16, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities by 17, to a maximum of 30.
Increase all of your abilities, to a maximum of 30.
Decline any bonus ability at this level.
You gain a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="SpellDifficultyClass">Spell Save DC</LSTag>, spell <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">attack rolls</LSTag>, and spell damage.
You are proficient with all bows, and gain a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="RangedWeaponAttack">ranged weapon attacks</LSTag> and damage.
You are proficient with all types of armour and shields. You gain a +1 bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> while wearing armour.

When you are wielding a melee weapon that is not Two-Handed in one hand, and no weapon in the other, you gain a +[1] bonus to Initiative Rolls, and deal additional damage equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

Additionally, if you are not carrying a shield, you gain a +[3] bonus to your Armour Class.
You gain <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="SleightOfHand">Sleight of Hand</LSTag>.

When you make melee unarmed attacks, your Dexterity <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifier">Modifier</LSTag> is added twice to the damage and <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>. Additionally, your damage dice are rolled twice and use the highest result.
You are proficient with all melee martial weapons, and gain a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="MeleeWeaponAttack">melee weapon attacks</LSTag> and damage.
Immediately gain an extra <LSTag Tooltip="Action">action</LSTag> to use this turn.

They'll never see you coming, until it's too late. As a bonus action, you can use <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_Dash_CunningAction">Cunning Action: Dash</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_Hide_BonusAction">Cunning Action: Hide</LSTag>, or <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_Disengage_CunningAction">Cunning Action: Disengage</LSTag>.

Your <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> increases by [1], and your jump distance by [2]. Jump no longer requires a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">bonus action</LSTag>.
You shrug off attacks, reducing damage from all sources by your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag>.

Can make an additional free attack after making an unarmed or weapon attack. This increases to two additional free attacks at level 11, and three additional free attacks at level 20.

If you gain the Extra Attack feature from more than one class, they don't add together.
You step through the hells, reappearing in another location.
You step through the hells, reappearing in another location.
Surrounded by silver mist, you teleport to an unoccupied space you can see.
Imbue a weapon with elemental power. It receives a +1 bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>, and deals an additional 1d4 damage of your choice.
You have become an expert at moving through the wilderness. <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DIFFICULT_TERRAIN">Difficult Terrain</LSTag> no longer slows you down, and you can't slip on grease or ice.
When you cast a damaging spell, add your <LSTag Tooltip="SpellcastingAbilityModifier">Spellcasting Modifier</LSTag> to the damage it deals.
Strike multiple foes at once. You gain <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Volley">Volley</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_Whirlwind">Whirlwind</LSTag>
Increase your Intelligence by 2, to a maximum of 30.
Increase your Wisdom by 2, to a maximum of 30.
Increase one of your abilities by 2, to a maximum of 30.
